---
title: "DC-TAP Endothelial differentiation analysis - power analysis comparison"
author: "Eugenio Mattei"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: true
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
params:
  selected_day: 0
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r}
library(here)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggExtra)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(pheatmap)

output_dir <- here("results", "2026-04-27_power_comparison", paste0("day", params$selected_day))
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}
```

# Load Perturbplan results

```{r}
# perturbplan results
perturbplan_results_path <- here(
  "results",
  "perturbplan",
  paste0("day", params$selected_day),
  "individual_power_from_sceptre_fitted_only.tsv"
)
# read perturbplan results
perturbplan_results <- read.delim(perturbplan_results_path)
perturbplan_results$pair_id <- paste(perturbplan_results$grna_target, perturbplan_results$response_id, sep = "||")
head(perturbplan_results)
```

# Load simulation results

```{r}
#simulation results
simulation_results_path <- here(
  "results",
  "power_analysis",
  paste0("power_analysis_results_es_0.15_day", params$selected_day,".tsv")
)
simulation_results <- read.delim(simulation_results_path)
simulation_results$pair_id <- paste(simulation_results$grna_target, simulation_results$response_id, sep = "||")
head(simulation_results)
```

# Scatter plot comparing power estimates

```{r}
# Merge the two results based on pair_id
merged_results <- merge(
  perturbplan_results[, c("pair_id", "power", "response_id", "num_cells")],
  simulation_results[, c("pair_id", "power", "response_id", "mean_pert_cells")],
  by = "pair_id",
  suffixes = c("_perturbplan", "_simulation")
)
# Calculate correlation
correlation <- cor(merged_results$power_perturbplan, merged_results$power_simulation)
print(paste("Correlation between perturbplan and simulation results:", correlation))
```



```{r}
# Thresholds
x_thresh <- 0.8
y_thresh <- 0.8

# Compute quadrants and counts
quad_counts_df <- merged_results %>%
  mutate(
    quadrant = case_when(
      power_perturbplan >= x_thresh & power_simulation >= y_thresh ~ "Q1",
      power_perturbplan <  x_thresh & power_simulation >= y_thresh ~ "Q2",
      power_perturbplan <  x_thresh & power_simulation <  y_thresh ~ "Q3",
      power_perturbplan >= x_thresh & power_simulation <  y_thresh ~ "Q4"
    )
  ) 
quad_counts <- quad_counts_df %>%
  dplyr::count(quadrant)
quad_counts
# Compute dynamic label positions
x_min <- min(merged_results$power_simulation, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(merged_results$power_simulation, na.rm = TRUE)
y_min <- min(merged_results$power_perturbplan, na.rm = TRUE)
y_max <- max(merged_results$power_perturbplan, na.rm = TRUE)

label_df <- tibble(
  quadrant = c("Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"),
  x = c(
    x_thresh + (1 - x_thresh) * 0.15,  # Q1: right of threshold
    x_thresh * 0.15,                   # Q2: left of threshold
    x_thresh * 0.15,                   # Q3: left of threshold
    x_thresh + (1 - x_thresh) * 0.15   # Q4: right of threshold
  ),
  y = c(
    y_thresh + (1 - y_thresh) * 0.85,  # Q1: above threshold
    y_thresh + (1 - y_thresh) * 0.85,  # Q2: above threshold
    y_thresh * 0.85,                   # Q3: below threshold
    y_thresh * 0.85                    # Q4: below threshold
  )
) %>%
  left_join(quad_counts, by = "quadrant") %>%
  mutate(
    n = tidyr::replace_na(n, 0),
    label = paste0(quadrant, ": ", n)
  )

breaks <- sort(unique(c(seq(0, 1, 0.25), 0.8)))

# Plot
p <- ggplot(merged_results, aes(x = power_perturbplan, y = power_simulation)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = y_thresh, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = x_thresh, linetype = "dashed", color = "blue") +
  geom_label(
  data = label_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = 0, vjust = 0,
    size = 4, fontface = "bold",
    fill = "white",
    alpha = 0.8,
    linewidth = 0
  )+
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkgreen", alpha = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = breaks) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = breaks) +
  labs(
    title = "Power Estimates: Perturbplan vs Simulation",
    subtitle = paste("Day 0 - Power Comparison (Correlation:", round(correlation, 2), ")"),
    x = "Perturbplan",
    y = "Simulations"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

p <- ggMarginal(
  p,
  type = "histogram",   # or "density"
  margins = "both",
  bins = 30,
  fill = "grey80",
  color = "grey40",
  size = 3
)

print(p)
ggsave(
  filename = here(output_dir, "power_comparison.png"),
  plot = p,
  width = 13.33,
  height = 7.5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

```

# Number of treated cells explains the 209 in Q2


```{r}
mask <- merged_results$num_cells/merged_results$mean_pert_cells < 1

p <- ggplot(merged_results, aes(x = num_cells, y = mean_pert_cells, color = mask)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "red", "FALSE" = "grey90"),
    labels = c("FALSE" = "No", "TRUE" = "Yes")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Number of Cells: Perturbplan vs Simulation",
    x = "Perturbplan (num_cells)",
    y = "Simulations (mean_pert_cells)",
    color = "Perturbplan < Simulation"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(
  filename = here(output_dir, "scatter_num_trt_cells.png"),
  plot = p,
  width = 13.33,
  height = 7.5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)
p
```
```{r}
quad_counts_df[mask,] %>%
  dplyr::count(quadrant)

```



```{r}
mask_q2_pairs <- quad_counts_df %>%
  filter(quadrant == "Q2") %>%
  pull(pair_id)

plot_df <- merged_results %>%
  mutate(mask = pair_id %in% mask_q2_pairs) %>%
  arrange(mask)

p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = num_cells, y = mean_pert_cells, color = mask)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "red", "FALSE" = "grey90"),
    labels = c("TRUE" = "Yes", "FALSE" = "No")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Number of Cells: Perturbplan vs Simulation",
    x = "Perturbplan (num_cells)",
    y = "Simulations (mean_pert_cells)",
    color = "Q2 pairs (209 pairs)  "
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(
  filename = here(output_dir, "scatter_num_trt_cells_q2_only.png"),
  plot = p,
  width = 13.33,
  height = 7.5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)
p
```

# Load SCEPTRE results

```{r}
sceptre_results_path <- here(
  "results",
  "sceptre",
  "annotated_results",
  paste0("sceptre_discovery_results_day", params$selected_da, "_grna20_annotated.tsv")
)
sceptre_results <- read.delim(sceptre_results_path)
# Add columns for perturbplan and simulation results
sceptre_results <- sceptre_results %>%
  left_join(
    merged_results[, c("pair_id", "power_perturbplan", "power_simulation")],
    by = "pair_id"
  ) %>%
  rename(
    power_perturbplan = power_perturbplan,
    power_simulation = power_simulation
  )
head(sceptre_results)
```
```{r}
df <- sceptre_results %>%
  filter(!is.na(power_perturbplan) & !is.na(power_simulation)) %>%
  mutate(
    pp_has_power  = power_perturbplan >= 0.8,
    sim_has_power = power_simulation >= 0.8,
    agreement = pp_has_power == sim_has_power,
    disagree = pp_has_power != sim_has_power,
    expr_decile = ntile(log10(tap_umi + 1), 10)
  )

df_long <- df %>%
  select(expr_decile, power_perturbplan, power_simulation) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(power_perturbplan, power_simulation),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "power"
  )

power_frac <- df %>%
  group_by(expr_decile) %>%
  summarise(
    frac_pp  = mean(pp_has_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    frac_sim = mean(sim_has_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(frac_pp, frac_sim),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "frac"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    method = recode(method,
      frac_pp = "power_perturbplan",
      frac_sim = "power_simulation"
    ),
    y = 1.03,
    label = paste0(round(frac * 100), "%")
  )

p <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = factor(expr_decile), y = power, fill = method)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  geom_text(
    data = power_frac,
    aes(x = factor(expr_decile), y = y, label = label, group = method),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.5,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.1), clip = "off") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "power_perturbplan" = "steelblue",
      "power_simulation" = "red"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "power_perturbplan" = "PerturbPlan",
      "power_simulation" = "Simulation"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Power vs Gene Expression (Deciles)",
    subtitle = "Fraction of pairs with power ≥ 0.8 shown above each boxplot",
    x = "Expression Decile (low → high)",
    y = "Power",
    fill = "Method"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(
  filename = here(output_dir, "power_vs_expression_deciles.png"),
  plot = p,
  width = 13.33,
  height = 7.5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

p
```
```{r}
df_long <- df %>%
  select(significant, power_perturbplan, power_simulation) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(power_perturbplan, power_simulation),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "power"
  )

label_df <- df %>%
  dplyr::count(significant) %>%
  mutate(
    y = 1.08,
    label = paste0("n=", n)
  )

power_frac <- df %>%
  group_by(significant) %>%
  summarise(
    frac_pp  = mean(power_perturbplan >= 0.8, na.rm = TRUE),
    frac_sim = mean(power_simulation >= 0.8, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(frac_pp, frac_sim),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "frac"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    method = recode(method,
      frac_pp = "power_perturbplan",
      frac_sim = "power_simulation"
    ),
    y = 1.03,
    label = paste0(round(frac * 100), "%")
  )

p <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = factor(significant), y = power, fill = method)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  geom_text(
    data = power_frac,
    aes(x = factor(significant), y = y, label = label, group = method),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.5,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(x = factor(significant), y = y, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.12), clip = "off") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "power_perturbplan" = "steelblue",
      "power_simulation" = "red"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "power_perturbplan" = "PerturbPlan",
      "power_simulation" = "Simulation"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Power vs SCEPTRE significant",
    subtitle = "Fraction of pairs with power ≥ 0.8 shown above each boxplot",
    x = "Significant",
    y = "Power",
    fill = "Method"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(
  filename = here(output_dir, "power_vs_sceptre_significant.png"),
  plot = p,
  width = 13.33,
  height = 7.5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

p
```


```{r}
df_long <- df %>%
  select(is_element_proximal, power_perturbplan, power_simulation) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(power_perturbplan, power_simulation),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "power"
  )

label_df <- df %>%
  dplyr::count(is_element_proximal) %>%
  mutate(
    y = 1.08,
    label = paste0("n=", n)
  )

power_frac <- df %>%
  group_by(is_element_proximal) %>%
  summarise(
    frac_pp  = mean(power_perturbplan >= 0.8, na.rm = TRUE),
    frac_sim = mean(power_simulation >= 0.8, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(frac_pp, frac_sim),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "frac"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    method = recode(method,
      frac_pp = "power_perturbplan",
      frac_sim = "power_simulation"
    ),
    y = 1.03,
    label = paste0(round(frac * 100), "%")
  )

p <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = factor(is_element_proximal), y = power, fill = method)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  geom_text(
    data = power_frac,
    aes(x = factor(is_element_proximal), y = y, label = label, group = method),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.5,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(x = factor(is_element_proximal), y = y, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.12), clip = "off") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "power_perturbplan" = "steelblue",
      "power_simulation" = "red"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "power_perturbplan" = "PerturbPlan",
      "power_simulation" = "Simulation"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Power vs proximity to TSS",
    subtitle = "Fraction of pairs with power ≥ 0.8 shown above each boxplot",
    x = "Significant",
    y = "Power",
    fill = "Method"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(
  filename = here(output_dir, "power_vs_proximity_to_tss.png"),
  plot = p,
  width = 13.33,
  height = 7.5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

p
```


```{r}
# Effect size comparison
effect_df <- sceptre_results %>%
  mutate(
    effect_bin = cut(
      effect_size,
      breaks = c(-Inf, -30, -20, -10, -5, 0, Inf),
      labels = c(
        "< -30",
        "-30 to -20",
        "-20 to -10",
        "-10 to -5",
        "-5 to 0",
        "> 0"
      ),
      right = TRUE
    )
  )

effect_df <- effect_df %>%
  filter(effect_size <= 0)

effect_df <- effect_df %>%
  mutate(
    pp_has_power  = power_perturbplan >= 0.8,
    sim_has_power = power_simulation >= 0.8
  )

power_counts <- effect_df %>%
  group_by(effect_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    prop_pp  = mean(power_perturbplan >= 0.8, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_sim = mean(power_simulation >= 0.8, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("prop"),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "prop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    method = recode(method,
      prop_pp = "power_perturbplan",
      prop_sim = "power_simulation"
    ),
    y = 1.03,
    label = paste0(round(prop * 100), "%")
  )

df_long <- effect_df %>%
  select(effect_bin, power_perturbplan, power_simulation) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(power_perturbplan, power_simulation),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "power"
  )

label_df <- effect_df %>%
  dplyr::count(effect_bin) %>%
  mutate(
    y = 1.03,
    label = paste0("n=", n)
  )

p <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = effect_bin, y = power, fill = method)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  geom_text(
    data = power_counts,
    aes(x = effect_bin, y = y, label = label, group = method),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.5,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.1), clip = "off") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "power_perturbplan" = "steelblue",
      "power_simulation" = "red"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "power_perturbplan" = "PerturbPlan",
      "power_simulation" = "Simulation"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Power vs Negative Effect Size Bins",
    subtitle = "Fraction of pairs with power ≥ 0.8 shown above each boxplot",
    x = "Effect Size Bin",
    y = "Power",
    fill = "Method"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(
  filename = here(output_dir, "power_vs_effect_size_bins.png"),
  plot = p,
  width = 13.33,
  height = 7.5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)
p
```
